name: inventrack
description: A web-based inventory management system with dashboard, REST API, and reporting.

scripts.postinstall: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');if(process.env.VERCEL||process.env.CI||process.env.SKIP_POSTINSTALL){console.log('Skipping Inventrack postinstall');process.exit(0)}const src=process.cwd();const dest=process.env.INIT_CWD||process.cwd();if(path.resolve(src)===path.resolve(dest)){console.log('Skipping self-copy');process.exit(0)}['api','backend','frontend','vercel.json','README.md'].forEach(f=>{const s=path.join(src,f),d=path.join(dest,f);if(fs.existsSync(s)&&path.resolve(s)!==path.resolve(d)){fs.cpSync(s,d,{recursive:true,force:true});console.log('✅ Copied: '+f)}});console.log('\n🎉 Inventrack project files copied!');"
